aronui.when_to_use: Use when the user has marked a selection in the Document Editor (e.g., a placeholder or sentence) and requests replacement or editing of that selection.
aronui.output_shape: The tool replaces the marked selection with the provided new_text. No return value from the tool; changes are reflected in the editor.

pitfalls.text: Both 'selection_index' (integer) and 'new_text' (string) are required parameters. The only error observed due to missing required fields or type errors was: 'Error: No active session (replace in edito
The tool is only available in the Web UI with an active chat session; attempting to use it in a different context results in the session error.

procedure: Ensure you are in a Web UI chat session with an active document editor.
Confirm that the user has marked a selection in the editor (e.g., highlighted text or a placeholder).
Identify the selection index (0-based) corresponding to the marked region to be replaced.
Determine the exact replacement text (new_text) as requested by the user.
Call the replace_editor_selection tool with selection_index (integer) and new_text (string).
verification: After calling the tool, verify that the marked region in the editor has been replaced with the new_text.
If an error occurs, check the error message. The only observed error is the session error, indicating the tool is not available in the current context.
